description: Reusable definitions for the story — the vocabulary of types and tags that elements reference. Definitions are optional; elements may use type and tag strings without a matching definition.

tags.description: Tag definitions. Each tag is referenced by ID from the tags array of any element.

types.description: Type definitions. Each type is referenced by ID from the type field of any typed element.

tags.name: Protagonist
tags.description: The central character driving the story.
